commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR generates flat `dist/plugin-sdk/*.d.ts` declarations, updates extension package-boundary aliases, excludes the old deep SDK declaration tree from the npm package, and adds installed-tarball TypeScript consumer proof to release-check.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +51, Config +7, Other +150. Total +212 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: release-check writes inventory before pack, this PR excludes `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**`, and the tarball checker rejects inventory entries missing from the tarball. I did not run packaging commands because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: A narrow repair can align package inventory generation with the new npm package exclusion and add focused package-acceptance coverage.

target.title: Refactor plugin SDK declarations for flat package types
target.body:
## Summary

- Generate bundled flat plugin SDK declarations directly under `dist/plugin-sdk/*.d.ts` instead of public shims that point into `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**`.
- Move extension package-boundary aliases to the flat declaration layout while preserving private local QA aliases that are intentionally not public package exports.
- Exclude `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` from the npm package and add installed-tarball TypeScript consumer proof to `release-check`.

## Size Impact

Measured with `npm --silent pack --json --ignore-scripts --pack-destination <tmp>` after a local build.

- Before: tarball 17,752,796 bytes; unpacked 78,901,660 bytes; 12,575 files; `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` count 3,972 files / 6,554,653 bytes.
- After: tarball 16,880,157 bytes; unpacked 75,096,948 bytes; 9,040 files; `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` count 0.
- Net: tarball -872,639 bytes; unpacked -3,804,712 bytes; file count -3,535.

The old deep tree removal is partially offset by 3,388,785 bytes of flat root declaration chunks needed to keep public `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` TypeScript imports working from the installed package.

## Verification

- `pnpm build`
- `node --experimental-strip-types scripts/write-plugin-sdk-entry-dts.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-vitest-flat-declaration-refactor-final node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/release-check.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/extension-package-project-boundaries.test.ts`
- `node --import tsx scripts/release-check.ts`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --blacksmith-org openclaw --blacksmith-workflow .github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml --blacksmith-job check --blacksmith-ref main --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json -- corepack pnpm run test:extensions:package-boundary:compile`
  - provider: blacksmith-testbox through Crabbox
  - Testbox id: `tbx_01kskw6yretenp20p8hbqsj7g5`
  - Result: 108 plugins compiled; exit 0

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Installed package no longer ships the unnecessary deep `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` declaration tree while public `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` TypeScript imports continue resolving.
Real environment tested: Local macOS Node 24 build/package checks plus Blacksmith Testbox Linux package-boundary compile through Crabbox.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: See Verification above.
Evidence after fix: npm pack measurement shows `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` count 0; release-check installed a packed tarball into a temporary consumer project and ran TypeScript against representative SDK imports; Testbox compiled 108 plugin package-boundary projects.
Observed result after fix: Build, release-check, focused Vitest, and Testbox package-boundary compile passed.
What was not tested: Full `pnpm check`/full test suite was not run locally; package-boundary broad proof was run remotely instead.
target.author: romneyda
